name: I hurt my neck at work yesterday in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?
description: Report to employer now, get medical care from approved doctor, document everything.

mainEntity.name: I hurt my neck at work yesterday in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer now, get medical care from approved doctor, document everything.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report the injury to your employer immediately, ideally within 24 hours, and seek medical attention from an approved provider.** In Utah, workers' comp covers workplace neck injuries if work-related, but prompt reporting preserves your claim.[1] Key factors: Get documentation from doctor linking injury to work; don't delay as Utah has a 180-day notice limit; employer must provide panel doctor list. See a doctor ASAP, request light duty if possible, and keep records of everything. Consult a workers' comp attorney if unsure about next steps.
